Doing that would allow you to redistribute the characters exactly how you want it. However, keep in mind that some of the SSR wheels from standard are really good. If you go all in on characters, then you won't have many wheels to do D-Tide which requires at bare minimum 40. Also, wheels enable characters do their job well. Gotta balance them out.
